payload.notes: Fourth E15 story; detect conflicts mechanically and let an agent rebase intent through normal commands, escalating only ambiguous intent.
payload.title: Worktree Conflict Recovery

payload.evidence: Real Git worktrees prove independent revision-0 updates converge, same-story revision-1 updates return structured CONFLICT with atomic rollback, and a stale local intent can be replaced by rerunning story update against revision 2.

payload.actions_taken: ["Created real disposable Git worktrees; merged independent and colliding changeset files; asserted structured revision conflict and rollback; removed the local stale intent; rebuilt and reran the high-level command; documented the recovery loop."]
payload.decisions_made: ["Let Git merge unique files; let revision guards detect semantic collision; let the agent rebase clear intent through ordinary commands; escalate ambiguous intent; add no locks","event DAG","or automatic resolver."]
payload.errors: ["The first fixture used non-causal lexical run names","so rebuild tried a dependent conflict file before its prerequisite; fixture run ids were made causally sortable","matching automatic nanosecond-based source ids."]
payload.notes: The conflict integration branch remains local in the fixture, so removing the agent-owned stale file does not rewrite shared history.
payload.task_summary: Proved and documented pragmatic agent-led worktree conflict recovery.

payload.actions_taken: ["Created real disposable Git worktrees; merged independent and colliding changeset files; asserted structured revision conflict and rollback; removed the local stale intent; rebuilt and reran the high-level command; documented the recovery loop."]
payload.decisions_made: ["Let Git merge unique files; let revision guards detect semantic collision; let the agent rebase clear intent through ordinary commands; escalate ambiguous intent; add no locks","event DAG","or automatic resolver."]
payload.errors: ["The first fixture failed because run_conflict_first sorted before its independent prerequisite; renamed fixture runs with ordered numeric prefixes and reran successfully."]
payload.harness_friction: Initial fixture run ids were not lexically causal; automatic source ids are time-sortable, and the explicit fixture ids were corrected to preserve dependency order.
payload.notes: Trace 292 omitted the explicit friction field; this detailed trace supersedes it. The conflict integration branch remains local, so stale-file removal does not rewrite shared history.
payload.task_summary: Proved and documented pragmatic agent-led worktree conflict recovery.
